longDescription.default: Keystone Pulse represents the living rhythm of the organization. Our people are the life of the business, and just like a pulse reveals the health and activity of a body, this tool helps us regularly check, understand, and manage where time is being invested across the company. By tracking hours, effort, and labor cost, Keystone Pulse gives us a clearer view of the organization's energy, capacity, and focus—helping ensure the business stays healthy, aligned, and moving in the right direction.

features.title: Keystone Pulse Feature
features.description: Provisions the Keystone Pulse web part
